title: [MTR4] UK LED PIDS
description: A staple on UK railways, these LED PIDS can provide convenient, compact information to your passengers! A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# UK LED PIDS pack for MTR
### This pack is _only_ compatible with MTR4. This pack requires the Joban Client Mod.

This is a resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway that adds the iconic UK LED PIDS for your stations! These PIDS display lots of relevant information for your passengers, including calling points, route number, destination, and carriage count.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TCa1eaW7/images/53c9e94e7798ae82eff44c2c6c31c71d844e19ec.png)

This pack contains a varient with Yellow Amber-coloured display and a varient with White-coloured display.
